---
name: Patient question
about: "How do I do X with OPL?" — we route these to user-docs improvements
title: "[question] <what you're trying to do>"
labels: question, docs
assignees: ''
---

⚠️ **OPL is a research-preview open-source tool, not a medical-device.**
We cannot answer "what should I do about my treatment" questions in
GitHub issues. For medical guidance, talk to your treating clinician.
In a medical emergency, dial your local emergency line first (China:
**120**; United States: **911**; EU: **112**).

This template is for questions about **how to use OPL itself** — e.g.
how to set up a patient folder, how to interpret an audit field, how to
connect a specific integrator.

## What you're trying to do

(One paragraph. The end-state you want.)

## What you've tried

(Commands run, error messages, where you got stuck.)

## What docs you've read

(README / SKILL.md / CONTRIBUTING / specific ADR / RFC — link them so we
can improve those docs if they were missing the answer.)

## Environment

- OPL version: (output of `opl status`)
- Python: (output of `python --version`)
- OS:

## Patient-data note

⚠️ **Do not paste real patient records.** Use anonymised examples or the
reference Riaz fixture if you need to show the layout.
